description_long: This is a single-story bungalow situated on a rectangular plot of land with a gently sloped green lawn surrounded by darker soil or mulch. The bungalow features a simple rectangular footprint, a moderately pitched gable roof in dark gray, and light-colored exterior walls, likely clad in siding. The front facade includes a small entryway with steps and a covered porch, while windows are symmetrically arranged on the visible sides. The roof has a single ridge running parallel to the longer side of the house, and the structure appears to be elevated slightly above the ground. The surrounding lot is open, with no visible fencing or landscaping features beyond the lawn.
description: A light-colored, single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, set on a rectangular green lawn bordered by soil. The house features a small front porch and symmetrically arranged windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entryway, covered porch, and main facade with symmetrically placed windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade and additional windows, with the roof ridge visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, steps, and the extent of the green lawn.
